data.body: First review BLOCK remediation: accepted both blockers. PlanRelationSnapshot now scans inbound block relations directly over the full preload so archived sources are not lost to find_inbound_relationships active filtering, and resign_plan_review now collects/passes the same pin set; resign.py and focused tests were added to file impact. Accepted advisories by normalizing material-fingerprint terminology, defining related_material as the exact fingerprint carrier, specifying PlanRelationSnapshotError -> logged unsigned INDETERMINATE behavior, naming ManifestFormatError home, enumerating all parser/abort tests, splitting compound ACs, and recording reproducible pytest commands. The unified signing-flow end-to-end and WARN/ERROR observability coverage was added to its owning phase child. Rerunning this child; no downstream review starts until it signs and verifies.
